message:
chore: bump to v1.1.5 for release with compilation fixes

v1.1.4 tag predated the PolledAfterCompletion and HttpClientConfig
fixes, so its CI build failed. This release includes all fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankensearch-fsfs"
-version = "1.1.4"
+version = "1.1.5"
 description = "Standalone fsfs CLI for two-tier hybrid local search"
 edition.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
